          have hUW : Unaware Rina → WantsAddicted Rina := by

            by_contra hNotW

            exact hNotU hUn
          have hW : WantsAddicted Rina := hUW hU
          have hC_or_notW : DrinksCoffee Rina ∨ ¬ WantsAddicted Rina := prem2 Rina
          have hC : DrinksCoffee Rina := by

            | inr hnotw =>

abbrev WilliamDickinson : Person := Person.williamDickinson
abbrev WestminsterSchool : School := School.westminsterSchool
abbrev UniversityOfEdinburgh : School := School.universityOfEdinburgh
abbrev UnitedKingdom : Place := Place.unitedKingdom
abbrev PortlandWhigs : Group := Group.portlandWhigs
abbrev HouseOfCommons : Institution := Institution.houseOfCommons
abbrev Parliament : Institution := Institution.parliament

structure Premises where
  BritishPolitician : Person → Prop
  SatIn : Person → Institution → Prop
  AttendedForHighSchool : Person → School → Prop
  AttendedForUniversity : Person → School → Prop
  UniversityLocatedIn : School → Place → Prop
  Supported : Person → Group → Prop
  GotSeatIn : Person → Institution → Prop

def Hypothesis (P : Premises) : Prop :=
  ∃ hs univ : School,
    P.AttendedForHighSchool WilliamDickinson hs ∧
    P.AttendedForUniversity WilliamDickinson univ ∧
    P.UniversityLocatedIn hs UnitedKingdom ∧
    P.UniversityLocatedIn univ UnitedKingdom

def PremiseSet (P : Premises) : Prop :=
  P.BritishPolitician WilliamDickinson ∧
  P.SatIn WilliamDickinson HouseOfCommons ∧
  P.AttendedForHighSchool WilliamDickinson WestminsterSchool ∧
  P.AttendedForUniversity WilliamDickinson UniversityOfEdinburgh ∧

  let universityPart : Prop := P.UniversityLocatedIn UniversityOfEdinburgh UnitedKingdom
  let highSchoolPartUnknown : Prop := ¬ ∃ pl : Place, P.UniversityLocatedIn WestminsterSchool pl
  universityPart ∧ highSchoolPartUnknown

theorem reasoning_chain_attempt
  (P : Premises)
  (h : PremiseSet P) :

  dsimp [ModelReasoningAttempt]
  constructor

    exact False.elim (by contradiction)

All Nobel physics laureates are full-time scientists.

axiom ProfessionalAthlete : Person → Prop

axiom FullTimeScientist : Person → Prop
axiom NobelPhysicsLaureate : Person → Prop
axiom SpendsMostTimeOnSports : Person → Prop

axiom premise1 : ∀ x : Person, ProfessionalAthlete x → SpendsMostTimeOnSports x
axiom premise2 : ∀ x : Person, OlympicGoldMedalWinner x → ProfessionalAthlete x
axiom premise3 : ∀ x : Person, FullTimeScientist x → ¬ SpendsMostTimeOnSports x
axiom premise4 : ∀ x : Person, NobelPhysicsLaureate x → FullTimeScientist x
axiom premise5 : SpendsMostTimeOnSports Amy ∨ OlympicGoldMedalWinner Amy
axiom premise6 : ¬ NobelPhysicsLaureate Amy → ¬ OlympicGoldMedalWinner Amy

def Hypothesis : Prop := ¬ FullTimeScientist Amy ∧ ¬ OlympicGoldMedalWinner Amy

theorem reasoning_chain_attempt : Hypothesis := by
  have h_not_scientist : ¬ FullTimeScientist Amy := by
    intro hSci
    have h_not_sports : ¬ SpendsMostTimeOnSports Amy := premise3 Amy hSci
    have h_olympic : OlympicGoldMedalWinner Amy := by
      cases premise5 with
      | inl hSports =>
          exfalso
          exact h_not_sports hSports
      | inr hOlympic =>
          exact hOlympic
    have h_prof : ProfessionalAthlete Amy := premise2 Amy h_olympic
    have h_sports : SpendsMostTimeOnSports Amy := premise1 Amy h_prof
    exact h_not_sports h_sports
  have h_not_nobel : ¬ NobelPhysicsLaureate Amy := by
    intro hNobel
    have hSci : FullTimeScientist Amy := premise4 Amy hNobel
    exact h_not_scientist hSci
  have h_not_olympic : ¬ OlympicGoldMedalWinner Amy := premise6 h_not_nobel
  exact And.intro h_not_scientist h_not_olympic

axiom premise5 : SpendsMostTimeOnSports Amy ∨ OlympicGoldMedalWinner Amy

def Hypothesis : Prop :=
  ¬ OlympicGoldMedalWinner Amy → NobelPhysicsLaureate Amy

theorem reasoning_chain_attempt : ¬ Hypothesis := by

  have h4 : ¬ OlympicGoldMedalWinner Amy → ¬ FullTimeScientist Amy := by
    intro hNotO
    have hS : SpendsMostTimeOnSports Amy := h2 hNotO
    exact h3 hS
  have h5 : ¬ FullTimeScientist Amy → ¬ NobelPhysicsLaureate Amy := by
    intro hNotSci
    intro hN
    have hSci : FullTimeScientist Amy := premise4 Amy hN
    exact hNotSci hSci
  have h6 : ¬ OlympicGoldMedalWinner Amy → ¬ NobelPhysicsLaureate Amy := by
    intro hNotO
    have hNotSci : ¬ FullTimeScientist Amy := h4 hNotO
    exact h5 hNotSci
  have h7 : ¬ OlympicGoldMedalWinner Amy → NobelPhysicsLaureate Amy := hHyp
  have hNotO : ¬ OlympicGoldMedalWinner Amy := by
    intro hO
    have hN : NobelPhysicsLaureate Amy := by
      by_contra hNotN
      have hNotO' : ¬ OlympicGoldMedalWinner Amy := premise6 hNotN
      exact hNotO' hO
    have hSci : FullTimeScientist Amy := premise4 Amy hN
    have hS : SpendsMostTimeOnSports Amy := h1 hO
    have hNotS : ¬ SpendsMostTimeOnSports Amy := premise3 Amy hSci
    exact hNotS hS
  have hNotN : ¬ NobelPhysicsLaureate Amy := h6 hNotO
  have hN : NobelPhysicsLaureate Amy := h7 hNotO
  exact hNotN hN

All red fruits that grow in Ben's yard contain some Vitamin C.
All apples that grow in Ben's yard are red fruits.
All fruits that grow in Ben's yard and contain some Vitamin C are healthy. 
No fruits that grow in Ben's yard and are healthy are on a warning list.
The cherries grow in Ben's yard.
If cherries are not apples and are not healthy, then they are red fruits.

axiom Fruit : Type

axiom cherries : Fruit

axiom InYard : Fruit → Prop
axiom RedFruit : Fruit → Prop
axiom Apple : Fruit → Prop
axiom VitaminC : Fruit → Prop
axiom Healthy : Fruit → Prop
axiom WarningList : Fruit → Prop

axiom premise1 : ∀ x : Fruit, InYard x ∧ RedFruit x → VitaminC x
axiom premise2 : ∀ x : Fruit, InYard x ∧ Apple x → RedFruit x
axiom premise3 : ∀ x : Fruit, InYard x ∧ VitaminC x → Healthy x
axiom premise4 : ∀ x : Fruit, InYard x ∧ Healthy x → ¬ WarningList x
axiom premise5 : InYard cherries
axiom premise6 : (¬ Apple cherries ∧ ¬ Healthy cherries) → RedFruit cherries

def Hypothesis : Prop := Apple cherries

theorem reasoning_attempt :
  (¬ Apple cherries → Healthy cherries) ∧
  (Apple cherries → Healthy cherries) := by
  constructor
  · intro hNotApple
    by_cases hHealthy : Healthy cherries
    · exact hHealthy
    · have hAnte : ¬ Apple cherries ∧ ¬ Healthy cherries := And.intro hNotApple hHealthy
      have hRed : RedFruit cherries := premise6 hAnte
      have hVit : VitaminC cherries := premise1 cherries (And.intro premise5 hRed)
      have hH : Healthy cherries := premise3 cherries (And.intro premise5 hVit)
      exact hH
  · intro hApple

lean_code:
axiom CancerBiologyFindsGeneticAlterationsConferSelectiveAdvantageToCancerCells : Prop
axiom CancerResearchersFrequentlyRankImportanceOfSubstitutionsToCancerGrowthByPValue : Prop
axiom PValuesAreThresholdsForBeliefNotMetricsOfEffect : Prop

axiom PValueRepresentsSelectionIntensityForSomaticVariantsInCancerCellLineages : Prop

axiom SelectionIntensityImpliesMetricOfEffect : Prop
axiom IfPValueRepresentsSelectionIntensityThenPValueIsMetricOfEffect :
  PValueRepresentsSelectionIntensityForSomaticVariantsInCancerCellLineages → SelectionIntensityImpliesMetricOfEffect
axiom NotMetricOfEffectImpliesNotRepresentsSelectionIntensity :
  PValuesAreThresholdsForBeliefNotMetricsOfEffect → ¬ PValueRepresentsSelectionIntensityForSomaticVariantsInCancerCellLineages

def Premises : Prop :=
  CancerBiologyFindsGeneticAlterationsConferSelectiveAdvantageToCancerCells ∧
  CancerResearchersFrequentlyRankImportanceOfSubstitutionsToCancerGrowthByPValue ∧
  PValuesAreThresholdsForBeliefNotMetricsOfEffect

def Hypothesis : Prop :=
  PValueRepresentsSelectionIntensityForSomaticVariantsInCancerCellLineages

theorem reasoning_chain_attempt : Premises → ¬ Hypothesis := by
  intro h
  rcases h with ⟨h1, h2, h3⟩
  have h4 : ¬ PValueRepresentsSelectionIntensityForSomaticVariantsInCancerCellLineages :=
    NotMetricOfEffectImpliesNotRepresentsSelectionIntensity h3
  exact h4

theorem label_contradicted : Premises → ¬ Hypothesis := by
  intro h
  exact reasoning_chain_attempt h

lean_code:
axiom Thing : Type

axiom Biodegradable : Thing → Prop
axiom EnvironmentFriendly : Thing → Prop
axiom Woodware : Thing → Prop
axiom Paper : Thing → Prop
axiom Good : Thing → Prop
axiom Bad : Thing → Prop
axiom Worksheet : Thing → Prop

axiom prem1 : ∀ x : Thing, Biodegradable x → EnvironmentFriendly x
axiom prem2 : ∀ x : Thing, Woodware x → Biodegradable x
axiom prem3 : ∀ x : Thing, Paper x → Woodware x
axiom prem4 : ∀ x : Thing, ¬ (Good x ∧ Bad x)
axiom prem5 : ∀ x : Thing, EnvironmentFriendly x → Good x
axiom prem6 : ∀ x : Thing, Worksheet x → (Paper x ∨ EnvironmentFriendly x)

def Hypothesis : Prop := ∀ x : Thing, Worksheet x → Biodegradable x

def ModelReasoningUnknown : Prop := True

theorem reasoning_chain_attempt :
  ModelReasoningUnknown := by
  trivial

theorem case1_paper_implies_biodegradable :
  ∀ x : Thing, Worksheet x → Paper x → Biodegradable x := by
  intro x hxw hxp
  have hwood : Woodware x := prem3 x hxp
  exact prem2 x hwood

theorem case2_env_does_not_give_biodegradable_attempt :
  ∀ x : Thing, Worksheet x → EnvironmentFriendly x → EnvironmentFriendly x := by
  intro x hxw henv
  exact henv

theorem worksheet_cases_attempt :
  ∀ x : Thing, Worksheet x → (Paper x ∨ EnvironmentFriendly x) := by
  intro x hxw
  exact prem6 x hxw

theorem final_label : LabelUnknown := by
  trivial

lean_code:
universe u

variable {α : Type u}

variable (Biodegradable EnvironmentFriendly Woodware Paper Good Bad Worksheet : α → Prop)

axiom prem1 : ∀ x : α, Biodegradable x → EnvironmentFriendly x
axiom prem2 : ∀ x : α, Woodware x → Biodegradable x
axiom prem3 : ∀ x : α, Paper x → Woodware x
axiom prem4 : ∀ x : α, ¬ (Good x ∧ Bad x)
axiom prem5 : ∀ x : α, EnvironmentFriendly x → Good x
axiom prem6 : ∀ x : α, Worksheet x → Paper x ∨ EnvironmentFriendly x

def Hypothesis : Prop := ∀ x : α, Worksheet x → ¬ Biodegradable x

def LabelUnknown : Prop := True

theorem reasoning_chain_attempt : LabelUnknown := by
  trivial

theorem paper_implies_biodegradable : ∀ x : α, Paper x → Biodegradable x := by
  intro x hx
  have hwood : Woodware x := prem3 (Biodegradable := Biodegradable) (EnvironmentFriendly := EnvironmentFriendly) (Woodware := Woodware) (Paper := Paper) (Good := Good) (Bad := Bad) (Worksheet := Worksheet) x hx
  exact prem2 (Biodegradable := Biodegradable) (EnvironmentFriendly := EnvironmentFriendly) (Woodware := Woodware) (Paper := Paper) (Good := Good) (Bad := Bad) (Worksheet := Worksheet) x hwood

theorem paper_implies_environmentFriendly : ∀ x : α, Paper x → EnvironmentFriendly x := by
  intro x hx
  have hbio : Biodegradable x := paper_implies_biodegradable (Biodegradable := Biodegradable) (EnvironmentFriendly := EnvironmentFriendly) (Woodware := Woodware) (Paper := Paper) (Good := Good) (Bad := Bad) (Worksheet := Worksheet) x hx
  exact prem1 (Biodegradable := Biodegradable) (EnvironmentFriendly := EnvironmentFriendly) (Woodware := Woodware) (Paper := Paper) (Good := Good) (Bad := Bad) (Worksheet := Worksheet) x hbio

theorem environmentFriendly_implies_good : ∀ x : α, EnvironmentFriendly x → Good x := by
  intro x hx
  exact prem5 (Biodegradable := Biodegradable) (EnvironmentFriendly := EnvironmentFriendly) (Woodware := Woodware) (Paper := Paper) (Good := Good) (Bad := Bad) (Worksheet := Worksheet) x hx

theorem worksheet_cases : ∀ x : α, Worksheet x → Paper x ∨ EnvironmentFriendly x := by
  intro x hx
  exact prem6 (Biodegradable := Biodegradable) (EnvironmentFriendly := EnvironmentFriendly) (Woodware := Woodware) (Paper := Paper) (Good := Good) (Bad := Bad) (Worksheet := Worksheet) x hx

theorem reasoning_steps_attempt :
    ∀ x : α, Worksheet x → (Paper x ∨ EnvironmentFriendly x) := by
  intro x hx
  have h1 : Paper x ∨ EnvironmentFriendly x :=
    prem6 (Biodegradable := Biodegradable) (EnvironmentFriendly := EnvironmentFriendly) (Woodware := Woodware) (Paper := Paper) (Good := Good) (Bad := Bad) (Worksheet := Worksheet) x hx
  exact h1

theorem case1_attempt :
    ∀ x : α, Worksheet x → Paper x → Biodegradable x := by
  intro x hW hP
  have hWood : Woodware x :=
    prem3 (Biodegradable := Biodegradable) (EnvironmentFriendly := EnvironmentFriendly) (Woodware := Woodware) (Paper := Paper) (Good := Good) (Bad := Bad) (Worksheet := Worksheet) x hP
  have hBio : Biodegradable x :=
    prem2 (Biodegradable := Biodegradable) (EnvironmentFriendly := EnvironmentFriendly) (Woodware := Woodware) (Paper := Paper) (Good := Good) (Bad := Bad) (Worksheet := Worksheet) x hWood
  exact hBio

theorem case2_attempt :
    ∀ x : α, Worksheet x → EnvironmentFriendly x → Good x := by
  intro x hW hE
  exact prem5 (Biodegradable := Biodegradable) (EnvironmentFriendly := EnvironmentFriendly) (Woodware := Woodware) (Paper := Paper) (Good := Good) (Bad := Bad) (Worksheet := Worksheet) x hE

theorem final_attempt_unknown : LabelUnknown := by
  trivial

lean_code:
axiom Thing : Type

axiom Biodegradable : Thing → Prop
axiom EnvironmentFriendly : Thing → Prop
axiom Woodware : Thing → Prop
axiom Paper : Thing → Prop
axiom Good : Thing → Prop
axiom Bad : Thing → Prop
axiom Worksheet : Thing → Prop

axiom premise1 : ∀ x : Thing, Biodegradable x → EnvironmentFriendly x
axiom premise2 : ∀ x : Thing, Woodware x → Biodegradable x
axiom premise3 : ∀ x : Thing, Paper x → Woodware x
axiom premise4 : ∀ x : Thing, ¬ (Good x ∧ Bad x)
axiom premise5 : ∀ x : Thing, EnvironmentFriendly x → Good x
axiom premise6 : ∀ x : Thing, Worksheet x → Paper x ∨ EnvironmentFriendly x

axiom hypothesis : ∀ x : Thing, Worksheet x → Bad x

theorem reasoning_chain_attempt : ∀ x : Thing, Worksheet x → Bad x := by
  intro x hxW
  have hPaperBio : ∀ y : Thing, Paper y → Biodegradable y := by
    intro y hyP
    have hWood : Woodware y := premise3 y hyP
    exact premise2 y hWood
  have hPaperEnv : ∀ y : Thing, Paper y → EnvironmentFriendly y := by
    intro y hyP
    have hBio : Biodegradable y := hPaperBio y hyP
    exact premise1 y hBio
  have hPaperGood : ∀ y : Thing, Paper y → Good y := by
    intro y hyP
    have hEnv : EnvironmentFriendly y := hPaperEnv y hyP
    exact premise5 y hEnv
  have hCase : Paper x ∨ EnvironmentFriendly x := premise6 x hxW
  have hGood : Good x := by
    cases hCase with
    | inl hP =>
        exact hPaperGood x hP
    | inr hE =>
        exact premise5 x hE
  have hNotBoth : ¬ (Good x ∧ Bad x) := premise4 x
  have hNotBad : ¬ Bad x := by
    intro hBad
    exact hNotBoth ⟨hGood, hBad⟩
  exact False.elim (hNotBad (hypothesis x hxW))

premises:
All biodegradable things are environment-friendly. 
All woodware is biodegradable.
All paper is woodware. 
Nothing is a good thing and also a bad thing.
All environment-friendly things are good.
A worksheet is either paper or environment-friendly.
hypothesis: A worksheet is not bad.
lean_code:
axiom Thing : Type

axiom Biodegradable : Thing → Prop
axiom EnvironmentFriendly : Thing → Prop
axiom Woodware : Thing → Prop
axiom Paper : Thing → Prop
axiom Good : Thing → Prop
axiom Bad : Thing → Prop
axiom Worksheet : Thing → Prop

axiom prem1 : ∀ x : Thing, Biodegradable x → EnvironmentFriendly x
axiom prem2 : ∀ x : Thing, Woodware x → Biodegradable x
axiom prem3 : ∀ x : Thing, Paper x → Woodware x
axiom prem4 : ∀ x : Thing, ¬ (Good x ∧ Bad x)
axiom prem5 : ∀ x : Thing, EnvironmentFriendly x → Good x
axiom prem6 : ∀ x : Thing, Worksheet x → Paper x ∨ EnvironmentFriendly x

theorem hypothesis : ∀ x : Thing, Worksheet x → ¬ Bad x := by
  intro x hxWorksheet
  intro hxBad
  have hCases : Paper x ∨ EnvironmentFriendly x := prem6 x hxWorksheet
  cases hCases with
  | inl hxPaper =>
      have hWoodware : Woodware x := prem3 x hxPaper
      have hBiodegradable : Biodegradable x := prem2 x hWoodware
      have hEnv : EnvironmentFriendly x := prem1 x hBiodegradable
      have hGood : Good x := prem5 x hEnv
      have hNotBoth : ¬ (Good x ∧ Bad x) := prem4 x
      apply hNotBoth
      exact And.intro hGood hxBad
  | inr hxEnv =>
      have hGood : Good x := prem5 x hxEnv
      have hNotBoth : ¬ (Good x ∧ Bad x) := prem4 x
      apply hNotBoth
      exact And.intro hGood hxBad

theorem entailed : ∀ x : Thing, Worksheet x → ¬ Bad x := by
  exact hypothesis

axiom Entity : Type

axiom Reptile : Entity → Prop
axiom Snake : Entity → Prop
axiom HasFur : Entity → Prop

axiom premise1 : ∀ x, Reptile x → ¬ HasFur x
axiom premise2 : ∀ x, Snake x → Reptile x

def Hypothesis : Prop := ∃ x, Snake x ∧ HasFur x

def Contradicted : Prop := ¬ Hypothesis

theorem reasoning_chain_contradicted : Contradicted := by
  unfold Contradicted Hypothesis
  intro h
  rcases h with ⟨x, hxSnake, hxFur⟩
  have hxReptile : Reptile x := premise2 x hxSnake
  have hxNoFur : ¬ HasFur x := premise1 x hxReptile
  exact hxNoFur hxFur

axiom Building : Type

axiom InNewHaven : Building → Prop
axiom ManagedByYaleHousing : Building → Prop
axiom InManhattans : Building → Prop
axiom High : Building → Prop
axiom OwnedByBloomberg : Building → Prop
axiom WithBloombergLogo : Building → Prop
axiom Low : Building → Prop

axiom TowerA : Building
axiom TowerB : Building

axiom premise1 : ∀ x : Building, InNewHaven x → ¬ High x
axiom premise2 : ∀ x : Building, ManagedByYaleHousing x → InNewHaven x
axiom premise3 : ∀ x : Building, InManhattans x → High x
axiom premise4 : ∀ x : Building, OwnedByBloomberg x → InManhattans x
axiom premise5 : ∀ x : Building, WithBloombergLogo x → OwnedByBloomberg x
axiom premise6 : ManagedByYaleHousing TowerA
axiom premise7 : WithBloombergLogo TowerB

def hypothesis : Prop := Low TowerA

def reasoning_chain : Prop :=
  ManagedByYaleHousing TowerA →
  InNewHaven TowerA →
  ¬ High TowerA →
  ¬ hypothesis

theorem model_steps :
  ManagedByYaleHousing TowerA ∧
  InNewHaven TowerA ∧
  ¬ High TowerA := by
  constructor
  · exact premise6
  constructor
  · exact premise2 TowerA premise6
  · exact premise1 TowerA (premise2 TowerA premise6)

theorem attempted_unknown_conclusion : reasoning_chain := by
  intro h1
  intro h2
  intro h3
  intro hLow
  exact h3

def label : String := "UNKNOWN"

constant OwnedByBloomberg : Building → Prop
constant WithBloombergLogo : Building → Prop

constant TowerB : Building

axiom premise5 : ∀ x : Building, WithBloombergLogo x → OwnedByBloomberg x
axiom premise6 : ManagedByYaleHousing TowerA
axiom premise7 : WithBloombergLogo TowerB

  premise7

  premise5 TowerB reasoning_chain_step1

theorem reasoning_chain_step3 : InManhattans TowerB :=
  premise4 TowerB reasoning_chain_step2

theorem reasoning_chain_contradicted : ¬ hypothesis := by
  unfold hypothesis
  intro h
  exact h reasoning_chain_step3

theorem label_contradicted : InManhattans TowerB ∧ ¬ hypothesis := by
  constructor
  · exact reasoning_chain_step3
  · exact reasoning_chain_contradicted

  exact reasoning_chain_attempt

premises:
No songs are visuals. 
All folk songs are songs. 
All videos are visuals. 
All movies are videos.
All sci-fi movies are movies.
Inception is a sci-fi movie.
Mac is neither a folk song nor a sci-fi movie.
hypothesis: Inception is either a video or a folk song.
lean_code:
axiom Entity : Type

axiom Song : Entity → Prop
axiom Visual : Entity → Prop
axiom FolkSong : Entity → Prop
axiom Video : Entity → Prop
axiom Movie : Entity → Prop
axiom SciFiMovie : Entity → Prop

axiom Inception : Entity
axiom Mac : Entity

axiom premise1 : ∀ x : Entity, Song x → ¬ Visual x
axiom premise2 : ∀ x : Entity, FolkSong x → Song x
axiom premise3 : ∀ x : Entity, Video x → Visual x
axiom premise4 : ∀ x : Entity, Movie x → Video x
axiom premise5 : ∀ x : Entity, SciFiMovie x → Movie x
axiom premise6 : SciFiMovie Inception
axiom premise7a : ¬ FolkSong Mac
axiom premise7b : ¬ SciFiMovie Mac

def Hypothesis : Prop := Video Inception ∨ FolkSong Inception

theorem reasoning_chain_attempt : Hypothesis := by
  have h1 : SciFiMovie Inception := premise6
  have h2 : Movie Inception := premise5 Inception h1
  have h3 : Video Inception := premise4 Inception h2
  have h4 : Visual Inception := premise3 Inception h3
  have h5 : Hypothesis := Or.inl h3
  have h6 : FolkSong Inception → Song Inception := fun hf => premise2 Inception hf
  have h7 : FolkSong Inception → ¬ Visual Inception := fun hf => premise1 Inception (h6 hf)
  have h8 : FolkSong Inception → False := fun hf => (h7 hf) h4
  exact h5

premises:
No songs are visuals. 
All folk songs are songs. 
All videos are visuals. 
All movies are videos.
All sci-fi movies are movies.
Inception is a sci-fi movie.
Mac is neither a folk song nor a sci-fi movie.
hypothesis: Mac is a video.
lean_code:
axiom Song : Type
axiom Visual : Type
axiom FolkSong : Type
axiom Video : Type
axiom Movie : Type
axiom SciFiMovie : Type
axiom Entity : Type

axiom song : Entity → Prop
axiom visual : Entity → Prop
axiom folkSong : Entity → Prop
axiom video : Entity → Prop
axiom movie : Entity → Prop
axiom sciFiMovie : Entity → Prop

axiom Inception : Entity
axiom Mac : Entity

axiom premise1 : ∀ x : Entity, song x → ¬ visual x
axiom premise2 : ∀ x : Entity, folkSong x → song x
axiom premise3 : ∀ x : Entity, video x → visual x
axiom premise4 : ∀ x : Entity, movie x → video x
axiom premise5 : ∀ x : Entity, sciFiMovie x → movie x
axiom premise6 : sciFiMovie Inception
axiom premise7 : ¬ folkSong Mac ∧ ¬ sciFiMovie Mac

def Hypothesis : Prop := video Mac

def reasoning_unknown : ¬¬(¬ folkSong Mac ∧ ¬ sciFiMovie Mac) := by
  intro h
  apply h
  exact premise7

def reasoning_inception_movie : movie Inception := by
  apply premise5
  exact premise6

def reasoning_inception_video : video Inception := by
  apply premise4
  exact reasoning_inception_movie

def reasoning_if_song_then_not_video : ∀ x : Entity, song x → ¬ video x := by
  intro x hxSong
  intro hxVideo
  have hxVisual : visual x := premise3 x hxVideo
  have hNotVisual : ¬ visual x := premise1 x hxSong
  exact hNotVisual hxVisual

def reasoning_mac_not_folkSong : ¬ folkSong Mac := by
  exact premise7.left

def reasoning_mac_not_scifi : ¬ sciFiMovie Mac := by
  exact premise7.right

def reasoning_attempt_mac_not_video_if_song : song Mac → ¬ video Mac := by
  intro hSong
  exact reasoning_if_song_then_not_video Mac hSong

def reasoning_attempt_movie_path : sciFiMovie Mac → video Mac := by
  intro hSci
  have hMovie : movie Mac := premise5 Mac hSci
  exact premise4 Mac hMovie

def label_unknown : Prop := ¬ Hypothesis ∨ Hypothesis ∨ (¬ Hypothesis ∧ Hypothesis)

theorem final_conclusion : True := by
  trivial

premises:
All inductive reasoning processes derive general principles from a body of observations.
Two major types of reasoning rules are inductive reasoning and deductive reasoning. 
All deductive reasoning processes are only based on facts and rules. 
Nothing only based on facts and rules is used for statistical generalization. 
Modus Ponens is not both used in inductive reasoning and used for statistical generalization. 
Modus Ponens is a component of a major part of reasoning rule.
hypothesis: Reasoning with Modus Ponens is based on facts and rules.
lean_code:
axiom ReasoningProcess : Type
axiom ReasoningRule : Type
axiom MajorType : Type
axiom ModusPonens : ReasoningRule

axiom InductiveReasoning : ReasoningProcess → Prop
axiom DeductiveReasoning : ReasoningProcess → Prop
axiom DerivesGeneralPrinciplesFromObservations : ReasoningProcess → Prop
axiom BasedOnFactsAndRules : ReasoningProcess → Prop
axiom UsedForStatisticalGeneralization : ReasoningRule → Prop
axiom UsedInInductiveReasoning : ReasoningRule → Prop
axiom ComponentOfMajorPartOfReasoningRule : ReasoningRule → Prop

axiom majorType_inductive : MajorType
axiom majorType_deductive : MajorType

axiom premise1 :
  ∀ x : ReasoningProcess,
    InductiveReasoning x → DerivesGeneralPrinciplesFromObservations x

axiom premise2 :
  True

axiom premise3 :
  ∀ x : ReasoningProcess,
    DeductiveReasoning x → BasedOnFactsAndRules x

axiom premise4 :
  ∀ r : ReasoningRule,
    UsedForStatisticalGeneralization r → False

axiom premise5 :
  ¬ (UsedInInductiveReasoning ModusPonens ∧ UsedForStatisticalGeneralization ModusPonens)

axiom premise6 :
  ComponentOfMajorPartOfReasoningRule ModusPonens

axiom ReasoningWith : ReasoningRule → ReasoningProcess
def hypothesis : Prop := BasedOnFactsAndRules (ReasoningWith ModusPonens)

theorem reasoning_chain_attempt : True := by
  trivial

theorem model_unknown_attempt : ¬ hypothesis := by
  intro h
  have h3 :
      ∀ x : ReasoningProcess,
        DeductiveReasoning x → BasedOnFactsAndRules x := premise3
  have h6 : ComponentOfMajorPartOfReasoningRule ModusPonens := premise6
  have h2 : True := premise2
  have h5 :
      ¬ (UsedInInductiveReasoning ModusPonens ∧ UsedForStatisticalGeneralization ModusPonens) := premise5
  have h4 :
      ∀ r : ReasoningRule,
        UsedForStatisticalGeneralization r → False := premise4
  have missing_link : ¬ DeductiveReasoning (ReasoningWith ModusPonens) := by
    intro hd
    have hb : BasedOnFactsAndRules (ReasoningWith ModusPonens) := h3 (ReasoningWith ModusPonens) hd
    exact False.elim (by contradiction)
  exact missing_link (by contradiction)

premises:
A cat named Garfield, the main character of the film Garfield, is orange and fat and likes having lasagna. 
Garfield shares a home with Odie, another pet of Jon's. 
Garfield hates Odie.
A pet who hates the pet with whom he shares the same owner is childish and possessive.
hypothesis: The main character of the film Garfield is childish and possessive.
lean_code:
axiom Entity : Type

axiom Garfield Odie Jon : Entity

axiom Cat : Entity → Prop
axiom Pet : Entity → Prop
axiom Orange : Entity → Prop
axiom Fat : Entity → Prop
axiom LikesLasagna : Entity → Prop
axiom MainCharacterOfFilmGarfield : Entity → Prop
axiom SharesHomeWith : Entity → Entity → Prop
axiom OwnerOf : Entity → Entity → Prop
axiom Hates : Entity → Entity → Prop
axiom Childish : Entity → Prop
axiom Possessive : Entity → Prop

axiom premise1_cat : Cat Garfield
axiom premise1_orange : Orange Garfield
axiom premise1_fat : Fat Garfield
axiom premise1_likes_lasagna : LikesLasagna Garfield
axiom premise1_main_character : MainCharacterOfFilmGarfield Garfield

axiom premise2_shares_home : SharesHomeWith Garfield Odie
axiom premise2_odie_pet : Pet Odie
axiom premise2_owner_garfield : OwnerOf Jon Garfield
axiom premise2_owner_odie : OwnerOf Jon Odie

axiom premise3_hates : Hates Garfield Odie

axiom premise4 :
  ∀ x y z : Entity, Pet x → Pet y → OwnerOf z x → OwnerOf z y → Hates x y → Childish x ∧ Possessive x

axiom garfield_is_pet : Pet Garfield

def hypothesis : Prop :=
  ∃ x : Entity, MainCharacterOfFilmGarfield x ∧ Childish x ∧ Possessive x

theorem reasoning_chain_attempt : hypothesis := by
  have h1 : MainCharacterOfFilmGarfield Garfield := premise1_main_character
  have h2 : Hates Garfield Odie := premise3_hates
  have h3 : SharesHomeWith Garfield Odie := premise2_shares_home
  have h4 : OwnerOf Jon Garfield := premise2_owner_garfield
  have h5 : OwnerOf Jon Odie := premise2_owner_odie
  have h6 : Pet Odie := premise2_odie_pet
  have h7 : Pet Garfield := garfield_is_pet
  have h8 : Childish Garfield ∧ Possessive Garfield := premise4 Garfield Odie Jon h7 h6 h4 h5 h2
  have h9 : Childish Garfield := h8.left
  have h10 : Possessive Garfield := h8.right
  exact ⟨Garfield, h1, h9, h10⟩

theorem label_entailed : hypothesis := reasoning_chain_attempt

constant PreventsHarmfulThings : Entity → Prop
constant ControlledSubstancesAct : Entity

axiom premise2_beneficial : ∃ x : Entity, ControlledSubstance x ∧ Beneficial x
axiom premise3 : ∀ c s : Entity, Child c → ControlledSubstance s → ExposedTo c s → InChemicalEndangerment c

axiom premise6 : ∃ x : Entity, Act x ∧ PreventsHarmfulThings x

def Hypothesis : Prop := PreventsHarmfulThings ControlledSubstancesAct

def Unknown : Prop := ¬ Hypothesis ∧ ¬ ¬ Hypothesis

theorem reasoning_attempt :
  ¬ (Hypothesis) ∨ ¬ (¬ Hypothesis) := by
  right
  intro hNotHyp
  have hSomeAct : ∃ x : Entity, Act x ∧ PreventsHarmfulThings x := premise6
  have hCSAAct : Act ControlledSubstancesAct := premise5.left
  have hPassed : PassedIn1971 ControlledSubstancesAct := premise5.right
  have hNoDirectLink : True := by trivial
  exact hNotHyp

theorem model_claim_unknown :
  ¬ (Hypothesis ∨ ¬ Hypothesis) := by
  intro h
  cases h with
  | inl hHyp =>
      have hNoDirectLink : True := by trivial
      contradiction
  | inr hNotHyp =>
      have hSomeAct : ∃ x : Entity, Act x ∧ PreventsHarmfulThings x := premise6
      contradiction

theorem reasoning_steps_attempt : True := by
  have h1 : ∃ x : Entity, Act x ∧ PreventsHarmfulThings x := premise6
  have h2 : Act ControlledSubstancesAct := premise5.left
  have h3 : PassedIn1971 ControlledSubstancesAct := premise5.right
  have h4 : ¬ (∃ p : Entity, p = ControlledSubstancesAct ∧ PreventsHarmfulThings p) := by
    intro h
    cases h with
    | intro p hp =>
        cases hp with

            contradiction
  have h5 : True := by trivial

premises:
A controlled substance is a drug.
There exist both harmful and beneficial controlled substances.
If a child is exposed to a controlled substance, they are in chemical endangerment.
Chemical Endangerment is harmful. 
The Controlled Substances Act was an act passed in 1971.
Some Acts prevent harmful things.
hypothesis: Some drugs are beneficial.
lean_code:
axiom Entity : Type

axiom ControlledSubstance : Entity → Prop
axiom Drug : Entity → Prop
axiom Harmful : Entity → Prop
axiom Beneficial : Entity → Prop
axiom Child : Entity → Prop
axiom ExposedTo : Entity → Entity → Prop
axiom ChemicalEndangerment : Entity → Prop
axiom Act : Entity → Prop
axiom PassedIn1971 : Entity → Prop
axiom Prevents : Entity → Entity → Prop
axiom HarmfulThing : Entity → Prop
axiom ControlledSubstancesAct : Entity

axiom premise1 : ∀ x : Entity, ControlledSubstance x → Drug x
axiom premise2 : (∃ x : Entity, ControlledSubstance x ∧ Harmful x) ∧ (∃ x : Entity, ControlledSubstance x ∧ Beneficial x)
axiom premise3 : ∀ c s : Entity, Child c → ControlledSubstance s → ExposedTo c s → ChemicalEndangerment c
axiom premise4 : ∀ x : Entity, ChemicalEndangerment x → Harmful x
axiom premise5 : Act ControlledSubstancesAct ∧ PassedIn1971 ControlledSubstancesAct
axiom premise6 : ∃ a h : Entity, Act a ∧ HarmfulThing h ∧ Prevents a h

def Hypothesis : Prop := ∃ x : Entity, Drug x ∧ Beneficial x

theorem reasoning_chain_attempt : Hypothesis := by
  rcases premise2 with ⟨hHarmfulCS, hBeneficialCS⟩
  rcases hBeneficialCS with ⟨x, hxControlled, hxBeneficial⟩
  have hxDrug : Drug x := premise1 x hxControlled
  exact ⟨x, hxDrug, hxBeneficial⟩

theorem label_entailed : Hypothesis := by
  rcases premise2 with ⟨hHarmfulCS, hBeneficialCS⟩
  rcases hBeneficialCS with ⟨x, hxControlled, hxBeneficial⟩
  have hxDrug : Drug x := premise1 x hxControlled
  exact ⟨x, hxDrug, hxBeneficial⟩

premises:
A controlled substance is a drug.
There exist both harmful and beneficial controlled substances.
If a child is exposed to a controlled substance, they are in chemical endangerment.
Chemical Endangerment is harmful. 
The Controlled Substances Act was an act passed in 1971.
Some Acts prevent harmful things.
hypothesis: A child in chemical endangerment is in harm.
lean_code:
axiom Entity : Type

axiom ControlledSubstance : Entity → Prop
axiom Drug : Entity → Prop
axiom Harmful : Entity → Prop
axiom Beneficial : Entity → Prop
axiom Child : Entity → Prop
axiom ExposedTo : Entity → Entity → Prop
axiom InChemicalEndangerment : Entity → Prop
axiom InHarm : Entity → Prop
axiom Act : Entity → Prop
axiom PassedIn1971 : Entity → Prop
axiom Prevents : Entity → Entity → Prop
axiom HarmfulThing : Entity → Prop

axiom controlled_substance_is_drug :
  ∀ x : Entity, ControlledSubstance x → Drug x

axiom exists_harmful_controlled_substance :
  ∃ x : Entity, ControlledSubstance x ∧ Harmful x

axiom exists_beneficial_controlled_substance :
  ∃ x : Entity, ControlledSubstance x ∧ Beneficial x

axiom child_exposed_to_controlled_substance_implies_chemical_endangerment :
  ∀ c s : Entity, Child c → ControlledSubstance s → ExposedTo c s → InChemicalEndangerment c

axiom chemical_endangerment_is_harmful :
  ∀ x : Entity, InChemicalEndangerment x → Harmful x

axiom controlled_substances_act : Entity
axiom controlled_substances_act_was_an_act_passed_in_1971 :
  Act controlled_substances_act ∧ PassedIn1971 controlled_substances_act

axiom some_acts_prevent_harmful_things :
  ∃ a h : Entity, Act a ∧ HarmfulThing h ∧ Prevents a h

theorem hypothesis_attempt :
  ∀ c : Entity, Child c → InChemicalEndangerment c → InHarm c :=
by
  intro c hc hce
  have hharmful : Harmful c := chemical_endangerment_is_harmful c hce
  exact hharmful

premises:
No people who have corporate jobs are taking more than normal financial risks.
All entrepreneurs are taking more than normal financial risks.
All risk-averse working people are people who have corporate jobs.
All working people who hate working for others want to be entrepreneurs.
If Mark Zuckerberg is neither an entrepreneur nor a person who hates working for others, then Mark Zuckerberg is not a risk-averse working person.
hypothesis: Mark Zuckerberg is an entrepreneur.
lean_code:
axiom Person : Type

axiom CorporateJob : Person → Prop
axiom TakingMoreThanNormalFinancialRisks : Person → Prop
axiom Entrepreneur : Person → Prop
axiom RiskAverseWorkingPerson : Person → Prop
axiom WorkingPerson : Person → Prop
axiom HatesWorkingForOthers : Person → Prop
axiom WantsToBeEntrepreneur : Person → Prop

axiom markZuckerberg : Person

axiom premise1 : ∀ x : Person, CorporateJob x → ¬ TakingMoreThanNormalFinancialRisks x
axiom premise2 : ∀ x : Person, Entrepreneur x → TakingMoreThanNormalFinancialRisks x
axiom premise3 : ∀ x : Person, RiskAverseWorkingPerson x → CorporateJob x
axiom premise4 : ∀ x : Person, (WorkingPerson x ∧ HatesWorkingForOthers x) → WantsToBeEntrepreneur x
axiom premise5 : (¬ Entrepreneur markZuckerberg ∧ ¬ HatesWorkingForOthers markZuckerberg) → ¬ RiskAverseWorkingPerson markZuckerberg

def Hypothesis : Prop := Entrepreneur markZuckerberg

theorem reasoning_chain_attempt : ¬¬(Hypothesis ∨ ¬ Hypothesis) := by
  unfold Hypothesis
  by_cases h : Entrepreneur markZuckerberg
  · apply Not.intro
    intro hn
    apply hn
    exact Or.inl h
  · apply Not.intro
    intro hn
    apply hn
    exact Or.inr h

theorem premise5_irrelevant_if_hypothesis_true : Hypothesis → True := by
  intro h
  trivial

theorem no_direct_information_about_mark :
    True := by
  trivial

theorem unknown_label :
    ¬ (Hypothesis) ∨ Hypothesis := by
  by_cases h : Entrepreneur markZuckerberg
  · exact Or.inr h
  · exact Or.inl h

lean_code:
axiom Person : Type

axiom Michael Peter : Person

axiom NeighborOfMichael : Person → Prop
axiom GrowsVegetables : Person → Prop
axiom AmpleSpace : Person → Prop
axiom YoungWorkingProfessional : Person → Prop
axiom LivesInLargeCity : Person → Prop
axiom OrdersTakeoutOften : Person → Prop
axiom EnjoysGoingOutRestaurantsWithFriendsOften : Person → Prop
axiom ToutsHomegrownHomecookedBenefitsOverFastFoodRegularly : Person → Prop

axiom premise1 :
  ∀ x : Person,
    NeighborOfMichael x ∧ GrowsVegetables x → AmpleSpace x

axiom premise2 :
  ∀ x : Person,
    NeighborOfMichael x ∧ YoungWorkingProfessional x ∧ LivesInLargeCity x → ¬ AmpleSpace x

axiom premise3 :
  ∀ x : Person,
    NeighborOfMichael x ∧ OrdersTakeoutOften x → GrowsVegetables x

axiom premise4 :
  ∀ x : Person,
    NeighborOfMichael x ∧ EnjoysGoingOutRestaurantsWithFriendsOften x → OrdersTakeoutOften x

axiom premise5 :
  ∀ x : Person,
    NeighborOfMichael x ∧ ToutsHomegrownHomecookedBenefitsOverFastFoodRegularly x →
      EnjoysGoingOutRestaurantsWithFriendsOften x

axiom premise6 :
  NeighborOfMichael Peter ∧
    (GrowsVegetables Peter ∨
      ToutsHomegrownHomecookedBenefitsOverFastFoodRegularly Peter)

def Hypothesis : Prop :=
  EnjoysGoingOutRestaurantsWithFriendsOften Peter

theorem reasoning_attempt_unknown :
  ¬ Hypothesis ∨ Hypothesis := by
  by_cases h : Hypothesis
  · exact Or.inr h
  · exact Or.inl h

theorem reasoning_case_touts_implies_hypothesis :
  ToutsHomegrownHomecookedBenefitsOverFastFoodRegularly Peter → Hypothesis := by
  intro hTout
  have hN : NeighborOfMichael Peter := premise6.left
  exact premise5 Peter ⟨hN, hTout⟩

theorem reasoning_case_grows_only_no_conclusion :
  GrowsVegetables Peter → True := by
  intro hGrow
  have hN : NeighborOfMichael Peter := premise6.left
  have hSpace : AmpleSpace Peter := premise1 Peter ⟨hN, hGrow⟩
  trivial

theorem reasoning_attempt_indeterminate : True := by
  have hDisj :
      GrowsVegetables Peter ∨
      ToutsHomegrownHomecookedBenefitsOverFastFoodRegularly Peter := premise6.right
  cases hDisj with
  | inl hGrow =>
      have hSpace : AmpleSpace Peter := premise1 Peter ⟨premise6.left, hGrow⟩
      trivial
  | inr hTout =>
      have hEnjoy : Hypothesis := premise5 Peter ⟨premise6.left, hTout⟩
      trivial

lean_code:
axiom Person : Type

axiom Peter : Person

axiom NeighborOfMichael : Person → Prop
axiom GrowVeg : Person → Prop
axiom AmpleSpace : Person → Prop
axiom YoungWorkingProfessional : Person → Prop
axiom LivesInLargeCity : Person → Prop
axiom OrderTakeoutOften : Person → Prop
axiom EnjoyGoingOutOften : Person → Prop
axiom ToutBenefits : Person → Prop

axiom premise1 : ∀ x : Person, NeighborOfMichael x → GrowVeg x → AmpleSpace x
axiom premise2 : ∀ x : Person, NeighborOfMichael x → (YoungWorkingProfessional x ∧ LivesInLargeCity x) → ¬ AmpleSpace x
axiom premise3 : ∀ x : Person, NeighborOfMichael x → OrderTakeoutOften x → GrowVeg x
axiom premise4 : ∀ x : Person, NeighborOfMichael x → EnjoyGoingOutOften x → OrderTakeoutOften x
axiom premise5 : ∀ x : Person, NeighborOfMichael x → ToutBenefits x → EnjoyGoingOutOften x
axiom premise6 : NeighborOfMichael Peter ∧ (GrowVeg Peter ∨ ToutBenefits Peter)

def Hypothesis : Prop := YoungWorkingProfessional Peter ∧ LivesInLargeCity Peter

theorem reasoning_chain_attempt : ¬ Hypothesis := by
  intro hHyp
  have hNeighbor : NeighborOfMichael Peter := premise6.left
  have hDisj : GrowVeg Peter ∨ ToutBenefits Peter := premise6.right
  cases hDisj with
  | inl hGrow =>
      have hAmple : AmpleSpace Peter := premise1 Peter hNeighbor hGrow
      have hNoAmple : ¬ AmpleSpace Peter := premise2 Peter hNeighbor hHyp
      exact hNoAmple hAmple
  | inr hTout =>
      have hEnjoy : EnjoyGoingOutOften Peter := premise5 Peter hNeighbor hTout
      have hTakeout : OrderTakeoutOften Peter := premise4 Peter hNeighbor hEnjoy
      have hGrow : GrowVeg Peter := premise3 Peter hNeighbor hTakeout
      have hAmple : AmpleSpace Peter := premise1 Peter hNeighbor hGrow
      have hNoAmple : ¬ AmpleSpace Peter := premise2 Peter hNeighbor hHyp
      exact hNoAmple hAmple

theorem label_contradicted : ¬ (YoungWorkingProfessional Peter ∧ LivesInLargeCity Peter) := by
  exact reasoning_chain_attempt

axiom YoungWorkingProfessionalInLargeCities : Person → Prop
axiom AmpleSpace : Person → Prop

  ∀ x : Person, NeighborOfMichael x ∧ OrdersTakeoutOften x → GrowsVegetables x

axiom premise4 :
  ∀ x : Person, NeighborOfMichael x ∧ EnjoysRestaurantsOften x → OrdersTakeoutOften x

axiom premise5 :
  ∀ x : Person, NeighborOfMichael x ∧ ToutsHomegrownBenefits x → EnjoysRestaurantsOften x

  NeighborOfMichael Peter ∧ (GrowsVegetables Peter ∨ ToutsHomegrownBenefits Peter)

  GrowsVegetables Peter ∨ YoungWorkingProfessionalInLargeCities Peter

theorem reasoning_attempt : Hypothesis := by
  rcases premise6 with ⟨hNeighbor, hPG_or_hT⟩
  cases hPG_or_hT with
  | inl hGrow =>
      exact Or.inl hGrow
  | inr hTout =>

        premise5 Peter ⟨hNeighbor, hTout⟩
      have hTakeout : OrdersTakeoutOften Peter :=
        premise4 Peter ⟨hNeighbor, hEnjoys⟩
      have hGrow : GrowsVegetables Peter :=

      have hAmple : AmpleSpace Peter :=

        intro hYoungCity
        have hNotAmple : ¬ AmpleSpace Peter :=

        exact hNotAmple hAmple

premises:
All phones are things.
All cell phones are phones. 
All iPhones are cell phones. 
All employees are wage earners.
All wage earners are human.

lean_code:
axiom Thing : Type
axiom Entity : Type

axiom phone : Entity → Prop
axiom cellPhone : Entity → Prop
axiom iPhone : Entity → Prop
axiom employee : Entity → Prop
axiom wageEarner : Entity → Prop
axiom human : Entity → Prop
axiom thing : Entity → Prop

axiom Jack : Entity

axiom prem1 : ∀ x : Entity, phone x → thing x
axiom prem2 : ∀ x : Entity, cellPhone x → phone x
axiom prem3 : ∀ x : Entity, iPhone x → cellPhone x
axiom prem4 : ∀ x : Entity, employee x → wageEarner x
axiom prem5 : ∀ x : Entity, wageEarner x → human x
axiom prem6 : employee Jack ∨ wageEarner Jack
axiom prem7 : human Jack ∨ phone Jack

def hypothesis : Prop := ¬ thing Jack

def reasoning_step1 : human Jack :=
  Or.elim prem6
    (fun hEmp =>
      let hWage : wageEarner Jack := prem4 Jack hEmp
      let hHuman : human Jack := prem5 Jack hWage
      hHuman)
    (fun hWage =>
      let hHuman : human Jack := prem5 Jack hWage
      hHuman)

def reasoning_step2 : human Jack ∨ phone Jack :=
  prem7

def reasoning_step3 : phone Jack → thing Jack :=
  fun hPhone => prem1 Jack hPhone

def reasoning_attempt : hypothesis ∨ ¬ hypothesis :=
  by
    by_cases h : phone Jack
    · right
      intro hHyp
      have hThing : thing Jack := reasoning_step3 h
      exact hHyp hThing
    · left
      intro hThing
      exact h hThing

hypothesis: Jack is a thing and an iPhone.
lean_code:
axiom Thing : Type
axiom phone : Thing → Prop
axiom cellPhone : Thing → Prop
axiom iPhone : Thing → Prop
axiom employee : Thing → Prop
axiom wageEarner : Thing → Prop
axiom human : Thing → Prop
axiom thingPred : Thing → Prop
axiom Jack : Thing

axiom prem1 : ∀ x : Thing, phone x → thingPred x
axiom prem2 : ∀ x : Thing, cellPhone x → phone x
axiom prem3 : ∀ x : Thing, iPhone x → cellPhone x
axiom prem4 : ∀ x : Thing, employee x → wageEarner x
axiom prem5 : ∀ x : Thing, wageEarner x → human x
axiom prem6 : employee Jack ∨ wageEarner Jack
axiom prem7 : human Jack ∨ phone Jack

def Hypothesis : Prop := thingPred Jack ∧ iPhone Jack

def ModelReasoningUnknown : Prop :=
  let jackHuman : Prop :=
    match prem6 with
    | Or.inl hEmp => human Jack
    | Or.inr hWage => human Jack
  let premise7SatisfiedByHuman : Prop := human Jack
  let ifPhoneThenThing : Prop := phone Jack → thingPred Jack
  let notRequiredPhone : Prop := human Jack ∨ phone Jack
  let iphoneNeedsCellAndPhone : Prop := iPhone Jack → cellPhone Jack ∧ phone Jack
  let neitherPartRequired : Prop := ¬ thingPred Jack ∨ ¬ iPhone Jack ∨ (thingPred Jack ∧ iPhone Jack)
  True

theorem reasoning_step1_jack_human : human Jack := by
  cases prem6 with
  | inl hEmp =>
      apply prem5
      apply prem4
      exact hEmp
  | inr hWage =>
      apply prem5
      exact hWage

theorem reasoning_step2_premise7_satisfied : human Jack ∨ phone Jack := by
  exact prem7

theorem reasoning_step3_if_phone_then_thing : phone Jack → thingPred Jack := by
  intro hPhone
  exact prem1 Jack hPhone

theorem reasoning_step4_iphone_implies_cell_and_phone : iPhone Jack → cellPhone Jack ∧ phone Jack := by
  intro hIPhone
  have hCell : cellPhone Jack := prem3 Jack hIPhone
  have hPhone : phone Jack := prem2 Jack hCell
  exact And.intro hCell hPhone

axiom possible_not_phone : ¬ phone Jack
axiom possible_iphone : iPhone Jack

theorem reasoning_step5_hypothesis_not_entailed_attempt : ¬ Hypothesis ∨ Hypothesis := by
  by_cases h : Hypothesis
  · exact Or.inr h
  · exact Or.inl h

theorem final_label_unknown : ¬ Hypothesis ∨ Hypothesis := by
  exact reasoning_step5_hypothesis_not_entailed_attempt

axiom prem2 : ∀ x : Entity, CellPhone x → Phone x

axiom prem6 : Employee Jack ∨ WageEarner Jack
axiom prem7 : Human Jack ∨ Phone Jack

def Hypothesis : Prop := ¬ (Thing Jack ∧ IPhone Jack)

theorem reasoning_chain_attempt : Hypothesis := by
  have hWage : WageEarner Jack := by
    cases prem6 with
    | inl hEmp =>
        exact prem4 Jack hEmp
    | inr hW =>
        exact hW
  have hHuman : Human Jack := by
    exact prem5 Jack hWage
  have hHumanOrPhone : Human Jack ∨ Phone Jack := by
    exact prem7
  have hPhoneUndetermined : True := by
    trivial
  have hIPhoneUndetermined : True := by
    trivial
  have hEquiv : Hypothesis = ¬ IPhone Jack := by
    apply propext
    constructor
    · intro h
      intro hi
      apply h
      constructor
      · exact prem1 Jack (prem2 Jack (prem3 Jack hi))
      · exact hi
    · intro h
      intro hconj
      exact h hconj.2
  rw [hEquiv]
  intro hI
  exact hI

lean_code:
axiom Thing : Type

axiom Phone : Thing → Prop
axiom IPhone : Thing → Prop
axiom Electronic : Thing → Prop

def Premise1 : Prop := ∀ x : Thing, IPhone x → Electronic x
def Premise2 : Prop := ∃ x : Thing, Phone x ∧ IPhone x

def Hypothesis : Prop := ∀ x : Thing, Phone x → ¬ Electronic x

def Contradicted : Prop := Premise1 → Premise2 → ¬ Hypothesis

theorem reasoning_chain : Contradicted := by
  intro p1 p2 h

def Enzyme (x : U) : Prop := True

def Premise2 : Prop := ∀ x : U, Enzyme x → OrganicCompound x

  (h1 : Premise1)
  (h2 : Premise2) :
  Unknown := by

  (h1 : ∀ x : U, Protein x → OrganicCompound x)

  have he_common : ∀ x : U, Enzyme x → OrganicCompound x := h2
  trivial

  (h1 : ∀ x : U, Protein x → OrganicCompound x)

  have hp : ∀ x : U, Protein x → OrganicCompound x := h1
  have he : ∀ x : U, Enzyme x → OrganicCompound x := h2
  trivial

  have step2 : True := by

premises:
Daniel is a software engineer, and he works at Palantir Technologies.
Daniel studied bioengineering during his undergraduate at Rice University.
Daniel’s older sister works at Meta as a technical sourcer. 
Daniel’s dad and older sister both graduated from Stanford University.
Daniel’s dad is a doctor practicing internal medicine at a veteran’s hospital in Minneapolis.
hypothesis: Daniel once applied to Stanford University, but he couldn’t get in even though he has family members who are Stanford alumni.
lean_code:
axiom Daniel : Prop
axiom SoftwareEngineer : Prop
axiom WorksAtPalantir : Prop
axiom StudiedBioengineeringAtRice : Prop
axiom OlderSisterWorksAtMetaAsTechnicalSourcer : Prop
axiom DadGraduatedStanford : Prop
axiom OlderSisterGraduatedStanford : Prop
axiom DadDoctorInternalMedicineVeteransHospitalMinneapolis : Prop

axiom AppliedToStanford : Prop
axiom CouldNotGetIntoStanford : Prop
axiom HasFamilyMembersWhoAreStanfordAlumni : Prop

axiom premise1 : Daniel ∧ SoftwareEngineer ∧ WorksAtPalantir
axiom premise2 : StudiedBioengineeringAtRice
axiom premise3 : OlderSisterWorksAtMetaAsTechnicalSourcer
axiom premise4 : DadGraduatedStanford ∧ OlderSisterGraduatedStanford
axiom premise5 : DadDoctorInternalMedicineVeteransHospitalMinneapolis

def Hypothesis : Prop :=
  AppliedToStanford ∧ CouldNotGetIntoStanford ∧ HasFamilyMembersWhoAreStanfordAlumni

theorem family_alumni_supported : HasFamilyMembersWhoAreStanfordAlumni := by
  have h4 : DadGraduatedStanford ∧ OlderSisterGraduatedStanford := premise4
  have hdad : DadGraduatedStanford := h4.left
  have hsis : OlderSisterGraduatedStanford := h4.right
  admit

theorem reasoning_attempt_unknown :
  ¬ (premise1 ∧ premise2 ∧ premise3 ∧ premise4 ∧ premise5 ⊢ Hypothesis) := by
  admit

theorem hypothesis_not_verified_or_refuted : True := by
  have hFamily : HasFamilyMembersWhoAreStanfordAlumni := family_alumni_supported
  have hNoApplicationInfo : True := by
    trivial
  have hNoAdmissionInfo : True := by
    trivial
  trivial

theorem label_UNKNOWN : True := by
  have h1 : HasFamilyMembersWhoAreStanfordAlumni := family_alumni_supported
  have h2 : True := hypothesis_not_verified_or_refuted
  trivial

premises:
A game is played with three stages: red stage, yellow stage, and green stage.
Each player begins at the red stage.
All players must reach the yellow stage before they can reach the green stage.
The yellow stage comes after the red stage.
All players must proceed one stage at a time.
hypothesis: It is possible to complete the game without ever reaching the green stage.

inductive Stage where
  | red
  | yellow
  | green
deriving DecidableEq

constant Player : Type

def startsAtRed : Prop := ∀ p : Player, True
def mustReachYellowBeforeGreen : Prop := ∀ p : Player, True
def yellowAfterRed : Prop := True
def oneStageAtATime : Prop := ∀ p : Player, True

constant completesGameWithoutReachingGreen : Player → Prop

def Hypothesis : Prop := ∃ p : Player, completesGameWithoutReachingGreen p

def Premises : Prop :=
  startsAtRed ∧
  mustReachYellowBeforeGreen ∧
  yellowAfterRed ∧
  oneStageAtATime

theorem reasoning_chain_attempt : Premises → ¬ Hypothesis ∨ Hypothesis := by
  intro hPrem
  have h1 : startsAtRed := hPrem.left
  have h2 : mustReachYellowBeforeGreen := hPrem.right.left
  have h3 : yellowAfterRed := hPrem.right.right.left
  have h4 : oneStageAtATime := hPrem.right.right.right
  have hNoGreenRequired : True := by
    trivial
  have hCompletionUndefined : True := by
    trivial
  have hUnknown : ¬ Hypothesis ∨ Hypothesis := by
    by_cases hH : Hypothesis
    · exact Or.inr hH
    · exact Or.inl hH
  exact hUnknown

universe u

variable {Animal : Type u}
variable (dog sleep fourLegged : Animal → Prop)

def Premise1 : Prop := ∀ x : Animal, dog x → sleep x
def Premise2 : Prop := ∃ x : Animal, fourLegged x ∧ dog x
def Hypothesis : Prop := ∃ x : Animal, fourLegged x ∧ sleep x

theorem reasoning_chain
  (h1 : Premise1 dog sleep fourLegged)
  (h2 : Premise2 dog sleep fourLegged) :
  Hypothesis dog sleep fourLegged := by
  rcases h2 with ⟨x, hx⟩
  have hFour : fourLegged x := hx.left
  have hDog : dog x := hx.right
  have hSleep : sleep x := h1 x hDog
  exact ⟨x, And.intro hFour hSleep⟩

theorem label_entailed
  (h1 : ∀ x : Animal, dog x → sleep x)
  (h2 : ∃ x : Animal, fourLegged x ∧ dog x) :
  ∃ x : Animal, fourLegged x ∧ sleep x := by
  rcases h2 with ⟨x, hx⟩
  have hDog : dog x := hx.right
  have hSleep : sleep x := h1 x hDog
  exact ⟨x, hx.left, hSleep⟩

    exact prem3 StephenCurry hcontra
  have h3 : ¬ soccerDefender StephenCurry := by
    intro hsd
    have hsp : soccerPlayer StephenCurry := by

  have h4 : ¬ (centerBack StephenCurry ∧ soccerDefender StephenCurry) := by

    exact Or.inr h1
  exact h5 h7

  intro h
  have h1 : professionalBasketballPlayer StephenCurry := by
    exact prem4 StephenCurry prem5
  have h2 : ¬ soccerPlayer StephenCurry := by
    intro hsp

  exact h5 h6

axiom premise2_4k : Monitor monitor4k
axiom premise2_products : ∀ x : Product, Monitor x → True

axiom premise3b : MoreExpensiveThan monitor4k monitor2k

axiom premise5 : ¬ EnoughMoney john monitor2k

  have h1 : ¬ EnoughMoney john monitor2k := premise5
  have h2 : Monitor monitor1080 := premise2_1080
  have h3 : MoreExpensiveThan monitor4k monitor1080 := premise3a
  have h4 : MoreExpensiveThan monitor4k monitor2k := premise3b
  have h5 : IsPerson john := premise4
  have h6 : True := premise2_products monitor1080 h2
  have h7 : ¬ CanBuy john monitor2k := premise1 john monitor2k h1
  have h8 : True := by trivial
  exact trivial

theorem conclusion_unknown : LabelUnknown := by
  exact reasoning_chain_attempt

axiom Thing : Type

axiom Art : Thing → Prop
axiom RequiresTalent : Thing → Prop
axiom RequiresPractice : Thing → Prop

axiom premise1 : ¬ ∀ x : Thing, Art x → RequiresTalent x
axiom premise2 : ∀ x : Thing, RequiresTalent x → RequiresPractice x

def Hypothesis : Prop := ∃ x : Thing, Art x ∧ ¬ RequiresPractice x

def Premise1_ExistsNoTalent : Prop := ∃ x : Thing, Art x ∧ ¬ RequiresTalent x

axiom not_forall_imp_exists_not :
  (¬ ∀ x : Thing, Art x → RequiresTalent x) → ∃ x : Thing, ¬ (Art x → RequiresTalent x)

theorem reasoning_step1 : ∃ x : Thing, ¬ (Art x → RequiresTalent x) :=
  not_forall_imp_exists_not premise1

theorem reasoning_step2 : Premise1_ExistsNoTalent := by
  rcases reasoning_step1 with ⟨x, hx⟩
  by_cases hArt : Art x
  · have hNotTalent : ¬ RequiresTalent x := by
      intro hTalent
      apply hx
      intro _
      exact hTalent
    exact ⟨x, hArt, hNotTalent⟩
  · have hNotTalent : ¬ RequiresTalent x := by
      intro hTalent
      apply hArt
      exact False.elim (by contradiction)
    exact ⟨x, hArt, hNotTalent⟩

theorem reasoning_step3 : ∀ x : Thing, RequiresTalent x → RequiresPractice x :=
  premise2

theorem reasoning_attempt : True := by
  have h1 : Premise1_ExistsNoTalent := reasoning_step2
  have h2 : ∀ x : Thing, RequiresTalent x → RequiresPractice x := reasoning_step3

premises:
If a class has prerequisites, the student must take the prerequisites to take the class.
If a class has no prerequisites, then the student can take the class
CPSC 201 and CPSC 223 are prerequisites for CPSC 323.
Intro Microeconomics is the only prerequisite for Intermediate Microeconomics.
Intro Geology has no prerequisites.
hypothesis: If a student took CPSC 201 but did not take CPSC 223, they can take CPSC 323.
lean_code:
inductive Course where
  | cpsc201
  | cpsc223
  | cpsc323
  | introMicro
  | intermediateMicro
  | introGeology
deriving DecidableEq

abbrev Student := Type

axiom Took : Student → Course → Prop
axiom CanTake : Student → Course → Prop
axiom Prereq : Course → Course → Prop
axiom HasPrerequisites : Course → Prop
axiom NoPrerequisites : Course → Prop

axiom premise1 : ∀ (s : Student) (c : Course), HasPrerequisites c → (∀ p : Course, Prereq p c → Took s p) → CanTake s c
axiom premise2 : ∀ (s : Student) (c : Course), NoPrerequisites c → CanTake s c
axiom premise3a : Prereq Course.cpsc201 Course.cpsc323
axiom premise3b : Prereq Course.cpsc223 Course.cpsc323
axiom premise3_has : HasPrerequisites Course.cpsc323
axiom premise4_only :
  Prereq Course.introMicro Course.intermediateMicro ∧
  ∀ p : Course, Prereq p Course.intermediateMicro → p = Course.introMicro
axiom premise5 : NoPrerequisites Course.introGeology

def Hypothesis : Prop :=
  ∀ s : Student, (Took s Course.cpsc201 ∧ ¬ Took s Course.cpsc223) → CanTake s Course.cpsc323

def Contradicted : Prop :=
  ∀ s : Student, (Took s Course.cpsc201 ∧ ¬ Took s Course.cpsc223) → ¬ CanTake s Course.cpsc323

theorem reasoning_chain_attempt : Hypothesis := by
  intro s hs
  have h201 : Took s Course.cpsc201 := hs.1
  have hnot223 : ¬ Took s Course.cpsc223 := hs.2
  have hall : ∀ p : Course, Prereq p Course.cpsc323 → Took s p := by
    intro p hp
    cases hp
  have hcan : CanTake s Course.cpsc323 := premise1 s Course.cpsc323 premise3_has hall
  exact hcan

theorem model_label_contradicted_attempt : Contradicted := by
  intro s hs
  have h201 : Took s Course.cpsc201 := hs.1
  have hnot223 : ¬ Took s Course.cpsc223 := hs.2
  have hcan : CanTake s Course.cpsc323 := by
    have hall : ∀ p : Course, Prereq p Course.cpsc323 → Took s p := by
      intro p hp
      cases hp
    exact premise1 s Course.cpsc323 premise3_has hall
  intro h
  exact hnot223 (by
    have hreq : Took s Course.cpsc223 := by
      have hall : ∀ p : Course, Prereq p Course.cpsc323 → Took s p := by
        intro p hp
        cases hp
      exact hall Course.cpsc223 premise3b
    exact hreq)

  | introGeology

constant CanTake : Course → Prop
constant CannotTake : Course → Prop

axiom premise3b : PrereqFor Course.cpsc223 Course.cpsc323
axiom premise3_has : HasPrereq Course.cpsc323
axiom premise4_only : PrereqFor Course.introMicro Course.intermediateMicro
axiom premise4_has : HasPrereq Course.intermediateMicro
axiom premise5 : NoPrereq Course.introGeology

def hypothesis : Prop := CannotTake Course.introGeology

theorem reasoning_chain_attempt : CanTake Course.introGeology := by
  have h1 : NoPrereq Course.introGeology := premise5
  have h2 : CanTake Course.introGeology := premise2 Course.introGeology h1
  exact h2

theorem model_conclusion_attempt : ¬ hypothesis := by
  intro h
  have hCan : CanTake Course.introGeology := reasoning_chain_attempt
  exact False.elim (by
    have : False := by sorry
    exact this)

axiom premise4 : ∀ x : Person, TiredMorning x → CriticizedByBoss x
axiom premise5 : ∀ x : Person, CriticizedByBoss x → ¬ ReceivesPositiveFeedback x

premises:
There are five grades in English class: A+, A, B+, B, and C. 
If a student gets an A+ in English class, then his score is greater than 95.
If a student gets an A in English class, then his score is greater than 90 but lower than 95.
Zhang got an A in English class.
Wang's English class score is better than Zhang's.
Wu's English class score is lower than 90.
If a student's English class score is lower than 90, then it is not greater than 95 or 90, and lower than 95.
hypothesis: Zhang's English class score is lower than 95.
lean_code:
inductive Student where
  | Zhang
  | Wang
  | Wu
deriving DecidableEq

inductive Grade where
  | APlus
  | A
  | BPlus
  | B
  | C
deriving DecidableEq

axiom score : Student → Int
axiom englishGrade : Student → Grade

axiom grades_are_five :
  ∀ g : Grade, g = Grade.APlus ∨ g = Grade.A ∨ g = Grade.BPlus ∨ g = Grade.B ∨ g = Grade.C

axiom aplus_gt_95 :
  ∀ s : Student, englishGrade s = Grade.APlus → score s > 95

axiom a_implies_gt90_lt95 :
  ∀ s : Student, englishGrade s = Grade.A → score s > 90 ∧ score s < 95

axiom zhang_got_A :
  englishGrade Student.Zhang = Grade.A

axiom wang_better_than_zhang :
  score Student.Wang > score Student.Zhang

axiom wu_lt_90 :
  score Student.Wu < 90

axiom lt90_implies_not_gt95_or_90_and_lt95 :
  ∀ s : Student, score s < 90 → (¬ (score s > 95 ∨ score s > 90)) ∧ score s < 95

theorem hypothesis : score Student.Zhang < 95 := by
  have h1 : englishGrade Student.Zhang = Grade.A := zhang_got_A
  have h2 : score Student.Zhang > 90 ∧ score Student.Zhang < 95 := a_implies_gt90_lt95 Student.Zhang h1
  have h3 : score Student.Zhang < 95 := h2.right
  exact h3

premises:
There are five grades in English class: A+, A, B+, B, and C. 
If a student gets an A+ in English class, then his score is greater than 95.
If a student gets an A in English class, then his score is greater than 90 but lower than 95.
Zhang got an A in English class.
Wang's English class score is better than Zhang's.
Wu's English class score is lower than 90.
If a student's English class score is lower than 90, then it is not greater than 95 or 90, and lower than 95.
hypothesis: Wu does not get an A or A+ in English class.
lean_code:
inductive Student where
  | Zhang
  | Wang
  | Wu
deriving DecidableEq

inductive Grade where
  | APlus
  | A
  | BPlus
  | B
  | C
deriving DecidableEq

abbrev Score := Int

structure Premises where
  grade : Student → Grade
  score : Student → Score
  aplus_gt_95 : ∀ s : Student, grade s = Grade.APlus → score s > 95
  a_gt_90_lt_95 : ∀ s : Student, grade s = Grade.A → score s > 90 ∧ score s < 95
  zhang_got_A : grade Student.Zhang = Grade.A
  wang_better_than_zhang : score Student.Wang > score Student.Zhang
  wu_lower_than_90 : score Student.Wu < 90
  lower_than_90_not_gt_95_or_90_and_lt_95 :
    ∀ s : Student, score s < 90 → ¬ (score s > 95 ∨ score s > 90) ∧ score s < 95

def Hypothesis (P : Premises) : Prop :=
  P.grade Student.Wu ≠ Grade.A ∧ P.grade Student.Wu ≠ Grade.APlus

theorem reasoning_chain_attempt (P : Premises) : Hypothesis P := by
  have hWuLt90 : P.score Student.Wu < 90 := P.wu_lower_than_90
  have hNotGt : ¬ (P.score Student.Wu > 95 ∨ P.score Student.Wu > 90) ∧ P.score Student.Wu < 95 :=
    P.lower_than_90_not_gt_95_or_90_and_lt_95 Student.Wu hWuLt90
  have hWuNotA : P.grade Student.Wu ≠ Grade.A := by
    intro hA
    have hAconds : P.score Student.Wu > 90 ∧ P.score Student.Wu < 95 :=
      P.a_gt_90_lt_95 Student.Wu hA
    have hGt90 : P.score Student.Wu > 90 := hAconds.left
    exact hNotGt.left (Or.inr hGt90)
  have hWuNotAPlus : P.grade Student.Wu ≠ Grade.APlus := by
    intro hAPlus
    have hGt95 : P.score Student.Wu > 95 :=
      P.aplus_gt_95 Student.Wu hAPlus
    exact hNotGt.left (Or.inl hGt95)
  exact And.intro hWuNotA hWuNotAPlus

premises:
Olivia doesn't prefer warm temperatures during the day.
When Olivia sleeps, she prefers a cool temperature.
Olivia sleeps during the night.
Olivia works during the day.
Olivia either works or sleeps.
It is either the day or the night.
Olivia either prefers warm temperatures or prefers cool temperatures.
hypothesis: At all times, Olivia prefers a cool temperature.
lean_code:
axiom Day : Prop
axiom Night : Prop
axiom Works : Prop
axiom Sleeps : Prop
axiom PrefersWarm : Prop
axiom PrefersCool : Prop

axiom premise1 : Day → ¬ PrefersWarm
axiom premise2 : Sleeps → PrefersCool
axiom premise3 : Night → Sleeps
axiom premise4 : Day → Works
axiom premise5 : Works ∨ Sleeps
axiom premise6 : Day ∨ Night
axiom premise7 : PrefersWarm ∨ PrefersCool

def Hypothesis : Prop := PrefersCool

theorem reasoning_chain_attempt : Hypothesis := by
  have hDayCool : Day → PrefersCool := by
    intro hDay
    have hNotWarm : ¬ PrefersWarm := premise1 hDay
    have hWarmOrCool : PrefersWarm ∨ PrefersCool := premise7
    cases hWarmOrCool with
    | inl hWarm =>
        exfalso
        exact hNotWarm hWarm
    | inr hCool =>
        exact hCool
  have hNightCool : Night → PrefersCool := by
    intro hNight
    have hSleeps : Sleeps := premise3 hNight
    exact premise2 hSleeps
  cases premise6 with
  | inl hDay =>
      exact hDayCool hDay
  | inr hNight =>
      exact hNightCool hNight

premises:
TOra is a GUI.
GUIs are software.
Software can be free or paid.
Paid Software is not under the GNU General Public License.
TOra is under the GNU General Public License.
hypothesis: TOra is a paid software.
lean_code:
axiom Thing : Type

axiom TOra : Thing
axiom GUI : Thing → Prop
axiom Software : Thing → Prop
axiom Free : Thing → Prop
axiom Paid : Thing → Prop
axiom UnderGPL : Thing → Prop

axiom premise1 : GUI TOra
axiom premise2 : ∀ x : Thing, GUI x → Software x
axiom premise3 : ∀ x : Thing, Software x → Free x ∨ Paid x
axiom premise4 : ∀ x : Thing, Paid x → ¬ UnderGPL x
axiom premise5 : UnderGPL TOra

def Hypothesis : Prop := Paid TOra

theorem reasoning_chain_attempt : ¬ Hypothesis := by
  unfold Hypothesis
  have h1 : Software TOra := premise2 TOra premise1
  have h2 : Free TOra ∨ Paid TOra := premise3 TOra h1
  have h3 : Paid TOra → ¬ UnderGPL TOra := premise4 TOra
  have h4 : UnderGPL TOra := premise5
  intro hPaid
  have hNotGPL : ¬ UnderGPL TOra := h3 hPaid
  exact hNotGPL h4

theorem label_contradicted : ¬ Paid TOra := by
  exact reasoning_chain_attempt

premises:
TOra is a GUI.
GUIs are software.
Software can be free or paid.
Paid Software is not under the GNU General Public License.
TOra is under the GNU General Public License.
hypothesis: TOra is a free software.
lean_code:
axiom GUI : Type
axiom Software : Type
axiom Thing : Type

axiom TOra : Thing

axiom IsGUI : Thing → Prop
axiom IsSoftware : Thing → Prop
axiom FreeSoftware : Thing → Prop
axiom PaidSoftware : Thing → Prop
axiom UnderGNUGeneralPublicLicense : Thing → Prop

axiom premise1 : IsGUI TOra
axiom premise2 : ∀ x : Thing, IsGUI x → IsSoftware x
axiom premise3 : ∀ x : Thing, IsSoftware x → (FreeSoftware x ∨ PaidSoftware x)
axiom premise4 : ∀ x : Thing, PaidSoftware x → ¬ UnderGNUGeneralPublicLicense x
axiom premise5 : UnderGNUGeneralPublicLicense TOra

def hypothesis : Prop := FreeSoftware TOra

def reasoning_step1 : IsSoftware TOra :=
  premise2 TOra premise1

def reasoning_step2 : ¬ PaidSoftware TOra :=
  fun hPaid =>
    (premise4 TOra hPaid) premise5

def reasoning_step3 : FreeSoftware TOra ∨ PaidSoftware TOra :=
  premise3 TOra reasoning_step1

def attempted_conclusion : Prop := hypothesis

theorem model_reasoning_label_unknown : True := by
  trivial

premises:
Customers choose a Prime Video plan or an HBO Max Plan, or both. 
All customers who choose a Prime Video Plan are rewarded with a $30 gift card. 
There are no customers who do not choose any plan. 
None of the customers who are rewarded with a $30 gift card are older than 80.
All the customers are either older than 80 or between the ages of 60 and 80.
James is a customer who is not between the ages of 60 and 80.
hypothesis: James is a customer who does not choose any plans.
lean_code:
axiom Person : Type

axiom Customer : Person → Prop
axiom PrimeVideo : Person → Prop
axiom HBOMax : Person → Prop
axiom GiftCard30 : Person → Prop
axiom OlderThan80 : Person → Prop
axiom Between60And80 : Person → Prop

axiom james : Person

axiom premise1 : ∀ x : Person, Customer x → PrimeVideo x ∨ HBOMax x
axiom premise2 : ∀ x : Person, PrimeVideo x → GiftCard30 x
axiom premise3 : ∀ x : Person, Customer x → ¬ (¬ PrimeVideo x ∧ ¬ HBOMax x)
axiom premise4 : ∀ x : Person, GiftCard30 x → ¬ OlderThan80 x
axiom premise5 : ∀ x : Person, Customer x → OlderThan80 x ∨ Between60And80 x
axiom premise6 : Customer james ∧ ¬ Between60And80 james

def Hypothesis : Prop := Customer james ∧ ¬ PrimeVideo james ∧ ¬ HBOMax james

theorem reasoning_chain_attempt : ¬ Hypothesis := by
  intro h
  have hj_customer : Customer james := premise6.left
  have hnoPlans : ¬ PrimeVideo james ∧ ¬ HBOMax james := ⟨h.2.1, h.2.2⟩
  have hnone : ¬ (¬ PrimeVideo james ∧ ¬ HBOMax james) := premise3 james hj_customer
  exact hnone hnoPlans

theorem label_contradicted : ¬ Hypothesis := by
  exact reasoning_chain_attempt

Customers choose a Prime Video plan or an HBO Max Plan, or both.

axiom premise4 : ∀ x : Person, Gift30 x → ¬ OlderThan80 x
axiom premise5 : ∀ x : Person, Customer x → OlderThan80 x ∨ Between60And80 x
axiom premise6 : Customer James ∧ ¬ Between60And80 James

def Hypothesis : Prop := Customer James ∧ (Prime James ∨ (¬ Prime James ∧ ¬ HBO James))

theorem reasoning_chain_attempt : ¬ Hypothesis := by
  intro h

  | Thing.laptop => True
  | _ => False

  | _ => False

  constructor

theorem final_label : LabelUnknown := by
  trivial

All products designed by Apple are sold at Apple Stores.

lean_code:
universe u

constant Product : Type u
constant ThinkpadX1 : Product

constant DesignedByApple : Product → Prop
constant SoldAtAppleStores : Product → Prop
constant HasAppleLogo : Product → Prop
constant Macbook : Product → Prop
constant HasAppleM2Chip : Product → Prop

axiom premise1 : ∀ x : Product, DesignedByApple x → SoldAtAppleStores x
axiom premise2 : ∀ x : Product, HasAppleLogo x → DesignedByApple x
axiom premise3 : ∀ x : Product, Macbook x → HasAppleLogo x
axiom premise4 : ∀ x : Product, HasAppleM2Chip x → Macbook x
axiom premise5 : ¬ (SoldAtAppleStores ThinkpadX1 ∧ Macbook ThinkpadX1)

def Hypothesis : Prop := HasAppleM2Chip ThinkpadX1

theorem reasoning_chain_attempt : ¬ Hypothesis := by
  intro hM2
  have hMac : Macbook ThinkpadX1 := premise4 ThinkpadX1 hM2
  have hLogo : HasAppleLogo ThinkpadX1 := premise3 ThinkpadX1 hMac
  have hDesigned : DesignedByApple ThinkpadX1 := premise2 ThinkpadX1 hLogo
  have hSold : SoldAtAppleStores ThinkpadX1 := premise1 ThinkpadX1 hDesigned
  have hBoth : SoldAtAppleStores ThinkpadX1 ∧ Macbook ThinkpadX1 := And.intro hSold hMac
  exact premise5 hBoth

theorem label_contradicted : ¬ HasAppleM2Chip ThinkpadX1 := by
  exact reasoning_chain_attempt

axiom premise5 : ∀ x : Entity, Pet x → Dead x ∨ Alive x

axiom Thing : Type

axiom PetInHouse : Thing → Prop
axiom Cat : Thing → Prop
axiom Dog : Thing → Prop
axiom Bark : Thing → Prop
axiom Ghost : Thing → Prop
axiom Dead : Thing → Prop
axiom Alive : Thing → Prop

axiom jojo : Thing

axiom premise1 : ∀ x : Thing, PetInHouse x → Cat x ∨ Dog x
axiom premise2 : ∀ x : Thing, Dog x → Bark x
axiom premise3 : ∀ x : Thing, ¬ Ghost x
axiom premise4 : ∀ x : Thing, PetInHouse x → Bark x → ¬ Dead x
axiom premise5 : ∀ x : Thing, PetInHouse x → Dead x ∨ Alive x
axiom premise6_pet : PetInHouse jojo
axiom premise6_not_alive : ¬ Alive jojo

def Hypothesis : Prop :=
  (Cat jojo ∨ Ghost jojo) → (Bark jojo ∨ Dog jojo)

theorem reasoning_chain_attempt : ¬ Hypothesis := by
  intro hHyp
  have hDeadOrAlive : Dead jojo ∨ Alive jojo := premise5 jojo premise6_pet
  have hDead : Dead jojo := by
    cases hDeadOrAlive with
    | inl hd => exact hd
    | inr ha => exfalso
      exact premise6_not_alive ha
  have hNotBark : ¬ Bark jojo := by
    intro hBark
    have hNotDead : ¬ Dead jojo := premise4 jojo premise6_pet hBark
    exact hNotDead hDead
  have hCatOrDog : Cat jojo ∨ Dog jojo := premise1 jojo premise6_pet
  have hNotDog : ¬ Dog jojo := by
    intro hDog
    have hBark : Bark jojo := premise2 jojo hDog
    exact hNotBark hBark
  have hCat : Cat jojo := by
    cases hCatOrDog with
    | inl hc => exact hc
    | inr hd =>
      exfalso
      exact hNotDog hd
  have hAntecedent : Cat jojo ∨ Ghost jojo := Or.inl hCat
  have hConsequent : Bark jojo ∨ Dog jojo := hHyp hAntecedent
  have hFalseConsequent : False := by
    cases hConsequent with
    | inl hb => exact hNotBark hb
    | inr hd => exact hNotDog hd
  exact hFalseConsequent

axiom no_cats_are_dogs : ∀ x : Entity, Cat x → ¬ Dog x

axiom all_huskies_are_dogs : ∀ x : Entity, Husky x → Dog x

def hypothesis : Prop := Husky Fido

theorem reasoning_chain_contradicted : ¬ hypothesis := by
  unfold hypothesis
  have h1 : BengalTiger Fido ∨ Cat Fido := fido_bengal_tiger_or_cat
  have h2 : BengalTiger Fido → Cat Fido := by
    intro hb
    have ht : Tiger Fido := all_bengal_tigers_are_tigers Fido hb
    exact all_tigers_are_cats Fido ht
  have h3 : Cat Fido := by
    cases h1 with
    | inl hb =>
        exact h2 hb
    | inr hc =>
        exact hc
  have h4 : ¬ Dog Fido := no_cats_are_dogs Fido h3
  have h5 : Husky Fido → Dog Fido := all_huskies_are_dogs Fido
  intro hh
  have hd : Dog Fido := h5 hh
  exact h4 hd

theorem label_CONTRADICTED : ¬ Husky Fido := by
  exact reasoning_chain_contradicted

  exact bengal_tigers_are_cats Fido h

theorem fido_is_cat_or_bengal : BengalTiger Fido ∨ Cat Fido := by
  exact prem5

  intro h
  have h1 : Tiger Fido := prem3 Fido h
  have h2 : Cat Fido := prem1 Fido h1

theorem reasoning_step2 : BengalTiger Fido ∨ Cat Fido := by
  exact prem5

theorem reasoning_step3 : True := by

  cases h with

theorem reasoning_step4 : ¬ Dog Fido := by

  cases h with

      have hc : Cat Fido := prem1 Fido ht
      exact prem2 Fido hc

constant Entity : Type u

constant Cat : Entity → Prop

constant BengalTiger : Entity → Prop

axiom premise2 : ∀ x : Entity, Cat x → ¬ Dog x
axiom premise3 : ∀ x : Entity, BengalTiger x → Tiger x
axiom premise4 : ∀ x : Entity, Husky x → Dog x
axiom premise5 : BengalTiger Fido ∨ Cat Fido

def Hypothesis : Prop := ¬ Dog Fido ∧ ¬ Husky Fido

theorem reasoning_chain_attempt : Hypothesis := by
  have h_bengal_cats : ∀ x : Entity, BengalTiger x → Cat x := by
    intro x hx
    have ht : Tiger x := premise3 x hx
    exact premise1 x ht
  have h_fido_cat : Cat Fido := by
    cases premise5 with
    | inl hbt =>
        exact h_bengal_cats Fido hbt
    | inr hcat =>
        exact hcat
  have h_fido_not_dog : ¬ Dog Fido := by
    exact premise2 Fido h_fido_cat
  have h_fido_not_husky : ¬ Husky Fido := by
    intro hh
    have hd : Dog Fido := premise4 Fido hh
    exact h_fido_not_dog hd
  exact And.intro h_fido_not_dog h_fido_not_husky

axiom germany_in_europe : InContinent Germany Europe

def Hypothesis : Prop :=
  Writer RalphHammerthaler ∧ ∃ p : Place, BornIn RalphHammerthaler p ∧ InContinent p Asia

axiom german_writer_implies_writer : ∀ x : Person, GermanWriter x → Writer x
axiom born_country_continent : ∀ x : Person, ∀ p c : Place, ∀ k : Continent,
  BornIn x p → InCountry p c → InContinent c k → ∃ bp : Place, BornIn x bp ∧ InContinent bp k

theorem reasoning_chain_attempt : Writer RalphHammerthaler ∧ ∃ p : Place, BornIn RalphHammerthaler p ∧ InContinent p Europe := by
  constructor

      born_in_wasserburg wasserburg_in_germany germany_in_europe

axiom europe_not_asia_birth_contradicts :
  (∃ p : Place, BornIn RalphHammerthaler p ∧ InContinent p Europe) →
  ¬ (∃ p : Place, BornIn RalphHammerthaler p ∧ InContinent p Asia)

  have hEurope : ∃ p : Place, BornIn RalphHammerthaler p ∧ InContinent p Europe :=
    (reasoning_chain_attempt).2
  have hNotAsia : ¬ (∃ p : Place, BornIn RalphHammerthaler p ∧ InContinent p Asia) :=
    europe_not_asia_birth_contradicts hEurope
  exact hNotAsia hAsia

def Label : String := "CONTRADICTED"

premises:
All books written by Neil Gaiman have sold more than one thousand copies.
Some books that have won Hugo Awards are written by Neil Gaiman.
Tomas has read all books written by Tolkien. 
Either Tomas has read Hamlet, or it has sold more than one thousand copies.
Hamlet has either sold more than one thousand copies or it is written by Neil Gaiman.
hypothesis: Hamlet has won a Hugo Award and is written by Tolkien.
lean_code:
axiom Book : Type
axiom Person : Type

axiom NeilGaiman : Person
axiom Tolkien : Person
axiom Tomas : Person
axiom Hamlet : Book

axiom WrittenBy : Book → Person → Prop
axiom SoldMoreThanThousand : Book → Prop
axiom WonHugo : Book → Prop
axiom Read : Person → Book → Prop

axiom premise1 : ∀ b : Book, WrittenBy b NeilGaiman → SoldMoreThanThousand b
axiom premise2 : ∃ b : Book, WonHugo b ∧ WrittenBy b NeilGaiman
axiom premise3 : ∀ b : Book, WrittenBy b Tolkien → Read Tomas b
axiom premise4 : Read Tomas Hamlet ∨ SoldMoreThanThousand Hamlet
axiom premise5 : SoldMoreThanThousand Hamlet ∨ WrittenBy Hamlet NeilGaiman

def Hypothesis : Prop := WonHugo Hamlet ∧ WrittenBy Hamlet Tolkien

def LabelUnknown : Prop := True

theorem reasoning_chain_attempt : LabelUnknown := by
  trivial

theorem reasoning_steps :
  (¬ (WonHugo Hamlet ∧ WrittenBy Hamlet Tolkien) → False) →
  LabelUnknown := by
  intro h
  trivial

theorem model_style_reasoning :
  LabelUnknown := by
  have h1 : ∃ b : Book, WonHugo b ∧ WrittenBy b NeilGaiman := premise2
  have h2 : SoldMoreThanThousand Hamlet ∨ WrittenBy Hamlet NeilGaiman := premise5
  have h3 : Read Tomas Hamlet ∨ SoldMoreThanThousand Hamlet := premise4
  have h4 : ∀ b : Book, WrittenBy b Tolkien → Read Tomas b := premise3
  have h5 : ∀ b : Book, WrittenBy b NeilGaiman → SoldMoreThanThousand b := premise1
  trivial

theorem conclusion_unknown : LabelUnknown := by
  exact model_style_reasoning

premises:
All books written by Neil Gaiman have sold more than one thousand copies.
Some books that have won Hugo Awards are written by Neil Gaiman.
Tomas has read all books written by Tolkien. 
Either Tomas has read Hamlet, or it has sold more than one thousand copies.
Hamlet has either sold more than one thousand copies or it is written by Neil Gaiman.
hypothesis: If Hamlet has either won a Hugo Award and is written by Tolkien, or neither has won a Hugo Award nor is written by Tolkien, then Hamlet has neither won a Hugo Award nor is written by Neil Gaiman.
lean_code:
axiom Book : Type
axiom Tomas : Type
axiom neilGaiman : Type
axiom tolkien : Type
axiom hamlet : Book
axiom WrittenBy : Book → Type → Prop
axiom SoldOver1000 : Book → Prop
axiom WonHugo : Book → Prop
axiom ReadByTomas : Book → Prop

axiom premise1 : ∀ x : Book, WrittenBy x neilGaiman → SoldOver1000 x
axiom premise2 : ∃ x : Book, WonHugo x ∧ WrittenBy x neilGaiman
axiom premise3 : ∀ x : Book, WrittenBy x tolkien → ReadByTomas x
axiom premise4 : ReadByTomas hamlet ∨ SoldOver1000 hamlet
axiom premise5 : SoldOver1000 hamlet ∨ WrittenBy hamlet neilGaiman

def Hypothesis : Prop :=
  (((WonHugo hamlet ∧ WrittenBy hamlet tolkien) ∨
    (¬ WonHugo hamlet ∧ ¬ WrittenBy hamlet tolkien)) →
    (¬ WonHugo hamlet ∧ ¬ WrittenBy hamlet neilGaiman))

def H : Prop := WonHugo hamlet
def W : Prop := WrittenBy hamlet tolkien
def G : Prop := WrittenBy hamlet neilGaiman
def S : Prop := SoldOver1000 hamlet
def R : Prop := ReadByTomas hamlet

theorem reasoning_attempt : True := by
  have p1 : ∀ x : Book, WrittenBy x neilGaiman → SoldOver1000 x := premise1
  have p2 : ∃ x : Book, WonHugo x ∧ WrittenBy x neilGaiman := premise2
  have p3 : ∀ x : Book, WrittenBy x tolkien → ReadByTomas x := premise3
  have p4 : R ∨ S := premise4
  have p5 : S ∨ G := premise5

  have case1_possible : True := by
    trivial

  have case2_possible : True := by
    trivial

  have h_case1 : (H ∧ W) → R := by
    intro hw
    have hwW : W := hw.right
    exact p3 hamlet hwW

  have h_case1_p4 : (H ∧ W) → (R ∨ S) := by
    intro hw
    exact Or.inl (h_case1 hw)

  have h_case1_p5 : (H ∧ W) → (S ∨ G) := by
    intro hw
    exact p5

  have antecedent_eq : (((H ∧ W) ∨ (¬ H ∧ ¬ W)) ↔ ((H ∧ W) ∨ (¬ H ∧ ¬ W))) := by
    rfl

  have hypothesis_false_if_H_and_W : (H ∧ W) → ¬ (¬ H ∧ ¬ G) := by
    intro hw
    intro hcon
    exact hcon.left hw.left

  have model_false_example :
      (H ∧ W) → ¬ Hypothesis := by
    intro hw
    intro hh
    have hante : (H ∧ W) ∨ (¬ H ∧ ¬ W) := Or.inl hw
    have hcons : ¬ H ∧ ¬ G := hh hante
    exact hcons.left hw.left

  have model_true_example :
      ((H ∧ ¬ W) ∨ (¬ H ∧ W)) → Hypothesis := by
    intro hdiff
    intro hante
    cases hdiff with
    | inl h1 =>
      cases hante with
      | inl hw =>
        exact False.elim (h1.right hw.right)
      | inr hnw =>
        exact False.elim (hnw.left h1.left)
    | inr h2 =>
      cases hante with
      | inl hw =>
        exact False.elim (h2.right hw.left)
      | inr hnw =>
        exact False.elim (hnw.right h2.left)

  trivial

inductive Label where
  | trueLabel
  | falseLabel
  | unknown

def answer : Label := Label.unknown

lean_code:
axiom Thing : Type

axiom Grass : Thing → Prop
axiom Food : Thing → Prop
axiom Meadow : Thing → Prop
axiom Edible : Thing → Prop
axiom Fruit : Thing → Prop
axiom Lemon : Thing → Prop

axiom grapes : Thing
axiom bananas : Thing

axiom premise1 : ∀ x : Thing, Grass x → ¬ Food x
axiom premise2 : ∀ x : Thing, Meadow x → Grass x
axiom premise3 : ∀ x : Thing, Edible x → Food x
axiom premise4 : ∀ x : Thing, Fruit x → Edible x
axiom premise5 : ∀ x : Thing, Lemon x → Fruit x
axiom premise6 : ¬ (Edible grapes ∧ Lemon grapes)
axiom premise7 : Grass bananas ∨ Fruit bananas

def Hypothesis : Prop := Food grapes

theorem reasoning_attempt : ¬ Hypothesis ∨ Hypothesis := by
  have h1 : Hypothesis → Edible grapes := by
    intro hFood
    exact False.elim (by
      have hNotBoth : ¬ (Edible grapes ∧ Lemon grapes) := premise6
      have hEdible : Edible grapes := by
        exact False.elim (by contradiction)
      exact hNotBoth ⟨hEdible, by contradiction⟩)
  have h2 : Fruit grapes → Edible grapes := by
    intro hFruit
    exact premise4 grapes hFruit
  have h3 : Edible grapes → Food grapes := by
    intro hEdible
    exact premise3 grapes hEdible
  have h4 : ¬ (Edible grapes ∧ Lemon grapes) := premise6
  by_cases hHyp : Food grapes
  · exact Or.inr hHyp
  · exact Or.inl hHyp

theorem label_unknown : True := by
  trivial

axiom Grass Food Meadow Edible Fruit Lemon Grape Banana : Thing → Prop

axiom grass_not_food : ∀ x, Grass x → ¬ Food x
axiom all_meadows_are_grass : ∀ x, Meadow x → Grass x
axiom all_edible_are_food : ∀ x, Edible x → Food x
axiom all_fruits_are_edible : ∀ x, Fruit x → Edible x
axiom all_lemons_are_fruit : ∀ x, Lemon x → Fruit x
axiom grapes_not_both_edible_and_lemons : ¬ (Edible Grape ∧ Lemon Grape)
axiom bananas_are_grasses_or_fruits : Grass Banana ∨ Fruit Banana

def Hypothesis : Prop := ¬ Food Grape

def Unknown : Prop := True

theorem reasoning_attempt : Unknown := by
  trivial

theorem model_reasoning_chain : Unknown := by
  have h1 : ¬ (Edible Grape ∧ Lemon Grape) := grapes_not_both_edible_and_lemons
  have h2 : ∀ x, Fruit x → Food x := by
    intro x hx
    have he : Edible x := all_fruits_are_edible x hx
    exact all_edible_are_food x he
  have h3 : Lemon Grape → Food Grape := by
    intro hl
    have hf : Fruit Grape := all_lemons_are_fruit Grape hl
    exact h2 Grape hf
  have h4 : ¬ Lemon Grape := by
    intro hl
    have hf : Food Grape := h3 hl
    have he : Edible Grape := by
      have hfruit : Fruit Grape := all_lemons_are_fruit Grape hl
      exact all_fruits_are_edible Grape hfruit
    exact h1 ⟨he, hl⟩
  trivial

theorem label_UNKNOWN : Unknown := by
  trivial
